nasb.text: “As for these things which you are looking at, the days will come in which there will not be left one stone upon another which will not be torn down.”

esv.text: “As for these things that you see, the days will come when there will not be left here one stone upon another that will not be thrown down.”

cnv.text: “你們看見的這些，到了日子，必沒有一塊石頭留在另一塊石頭上面，每一塊都要拆下來。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“你们现在所见到的，将来有一天要被完全拆毁，找不到两块叠在一起的石头。”

csbs.text: “你们现在所看见的这些，当那些日子来到的时候，将不会有一块石头留在另一块石头上而不被拆下。”
